text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho is over, and the Japanese Derby
is fast approaching when...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What is this? A "BNW Special Feature"? What
does BNW mean?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it. It must stand for "Biwa Hayahide,"
"Narita Taishin," and "Winning Ticket."

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pfft. Talk about unimaginative.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin acts unimpressed, but it's easy to
see the joy in her expression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Public opinion has completely changed following
Narita Taishin's impressive run in the Satsuki Sho.
The era of the "top two" has ended, and all focus
is now on the BNW trio!
choice_data_list:
Let's throw everything we've got at the
Japanese Derby!

Let's throw everything we've got at the
Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sure.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Can we end the meeting now? Cool, I'm gonna
get going.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: TAISHIIIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Gah?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You again! Learn to dial down that defeaning
voice of yours!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sorry! But I really...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Reeeaaally wanna have a scrimmage with you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket's unstoppable enthusiasm
practically teleports us to the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I had wanted Narita Taishin to take it easy since
she was done training for the day, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Stop worrying so much. It's just a scrimmage. I've
got enough energy left for one more.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ticket might be the biggest dum-dum in the
world...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But the way she puts her heart and soul into the
Derby is the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think it'd be worthwhile to see what she
can do?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin! I'm ready—let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll be back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-chak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The scrimmage between Narita Taishin and
Winning Ticket begins!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a 2,400-meter run on turf, the same as the
Japanese Derby. Winning Ticket is pushing hard
from the get-go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be on the offensive as she races
down the track.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once they enter the final straight, Winning Ticket
releases a fearsome burst of speed.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're not gonna get the better of me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's just as unrelenting. Her last sprint
is as amazing as ever—or rather, it's gotten more
fierce since the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the last 200 meters, Narita Taishin manages to
push her nose ahead of Winning Ticket for a
moment, but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Derby! Derby, Derby, Deeerrrbyyy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I won't let you take the Derby crown away from
meee!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The dust clears...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket manages to claw back the lead
and win the scrimmage by a nose.

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Huff... Phew! Thank you, Taishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Who thanks their opponent after royally thrashing them? Way to tick me off.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I managed to win today, but you know
what?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I was only able to do it because I saw you race at
the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You really are amazing, Taishin! You're
super-duper strong! But that's why I gotta get
strong too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I need to become strong enough to beat you if I
wanna fulfill my dream and become a Derby
champion!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
When I train, all I think about is beating
you—about winning no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Then you must be happy with your win
today.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Not at all! This wasn't the real Derby, and I only barely won.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Besides! You're totally gonna get even faster by
the time the Derby comes around!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No duh.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! That's why I gotta, gotta, gotta train more too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Later, Taishiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
How can she still run like that? Where does she
keep all that energy?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you were watching, right? You saw how fast
Ticket was?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Good. I'll see you at tomorrow's meeting.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
We've gotta come up with a training regimen to
defeat her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To challenge and be challenged—they push each
other further ahead. Having a rival who so
earnestly pursues her dream is a great influence
on Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At least, that's what I thought.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! Deeerbyyyyy!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Just a dream, huh...
